mcqs.question: Average time complexity for search in a hash table is:
mcqs.explanation: With a good hash function and low load factor, hash tables provide O(1) average-case operations.

mcqs.question: Load factor of a hash table is defined as:
mcqs.explanation: Load factor α = n/m where n is number of elements and m is table size.

mcqs.question: When does a hash table have worst-case O(n) time complexity?

options.text: When all keys hash to same index

mcqs.explanation: If all keys collide (hash to same index), the hash table degenerates to a linked list with O(n) operations.
